topic: Payment Modes and Online Gateway Integration for Fee Collection
summary: Details the available payment modes (cash, cheque, online) and the integration with payment gateways like Razorpay for online fee collection.
navigation: Fee Collection Section > Proceed > Payment Mode Selection
steps: For Cash: This is the default selection.
For Cheque: Enter cheque details (bank, reference number, date).
For Online (via 'Collect Fee' option): Select 'Online', choose the institute bank, enter a reference number (optional), select a date (optional), and add remarks (optional).
For Direct Online Collection (via 'Collect Online' option): Select 'Collect Online', and the system will redirect to the payment gateway (e.g., Razorpay) for scanning/card payment.
business_rules: Razorpay is integrated as the payment gateway.
Institute banks must be configured in the system.
important_notes: Direct online collection (via 'Collect Online') immediately redirects to the payment gateway.
Online payments processed through the general 'Collect Fee' option are for back-gate entries or when payment was made externally and needs to be recorded.
Payment gateway charges may apply (e.g., GST, bank charges).
questions: What payment methods are available for fee collection?
How do I record an online payment that was made outside the ERP system?
How does the online payment gateway work for fee collection?
Are there any charges for online payments?
